query:
UPDATE auto_post_schedules 
SET 
  name = 'LCJ MALL 定期投稿',
  enabled = 1,
  intervalDays = 2,
  preferredHour = 10,
  keywordStrategy = 'preset',
  articleType = 'guide',
  tone = 'professional',
  articleLength = 'standard',
  language = 'ja',
  generateImages = 1,
  autoPublish = 'publish',
  nextRunAt = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MINUTE),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE id = 150007;
